description: Complete walkthrough covering remaining achievement/trophy bosses (Ancestor Spirits, Valiant Gargoyles, Dragonkin Soldier), all remaining Great Ghost Gloveworts, Great Grave Gloveworts, Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearings, rune farming for NG+ preparation, and important info about Walking Mausoleums and single-pickup items.

steps.title: Light 8 Altars Throughout Lower Siofra River
steps.description: Start at the Siofra River Bank grace. Travel throughout the lower area of Siofra River, lighting the fires at 8 different altars along the way.

steps.title: Interact with Glowing Deer Carcass at Hallowhorn Grounds (Southeast)
steps.description: After lighting all 8, head to the Hallowhorn Grounds at the southeast corner of Siofra River. Find and interact with the glowing deer carcass.

steps.title: Defeat Ancestor Spirit – Ancestral Follower Ashes
steps.description: Defeat the Ancestor Spirit (fairly trivial). Drops the Ancestral Follower Ashes. Unlocks achievement/trophy.

steps.title: Light 6 Altars Throughout Upper Siofra River
steps.description: Start from the Ancestral Woods. Run around the upper area of Siofra River, lighting the fires at 6 new altars.

steps.title: Interact with Glowing Deer at Hallowhorn Grounds (Northeast of Ancestral Woods)
steps.description: After lighting all 6, head to the different Hallowhorn Grounds northeast of the Ancestral Woods grace. Interact with the glowing deer.

steps.title: Defeat Regal Ancestor Spirit – Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor
steps.description: Defeat the Regal Ancestor Spirit (a bit harder but still easy at this level). Drops the Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor. Unlocks achievement/trophy.

steps.title: Defeat Valiant Gargoyle Duo
steps.description: If not already done, return to the Siofra Aqueduct (near where D's Twin Brother was). Defeat the duo for Gargoyle's Greatsword and Gargoyle's Twinblade. Unlocks achievement/trophy.

phases.title: Ainsel River – Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstella

steps.title: Defeat Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstella – Frozen Lightning Spear
steps.description: Travel southwest along Ainsel River to the Downstream grace. Curve around the river and head north to a secluded area near Nokstella. Defeat the Dragonkin Soldier for the Frozen Lightning Spear incantation. Unlocks achievement/trophy.

steps.title: Pick Up Great Ghost Glovewort (Chest Nearby)
steps.description: Find a chest located nearby containing a Great Ghost Glovewort.

phases.title: Mohgwyn Palace – Final Great Ghost Glovewort

steps.title: Pick Up Great Ghost Glovewort (Dynasty Mausoleum Midpoint)
steps.description: Start from the Dynasty Mausoleum Midpoint. Backtrack into the preceding cavern. Immediately south, find a pit of undead. Move past them quickly to grab the Great Ghost Glovewort from its stalk.

steps.title: Enter Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave
steps.description: Travel southwest from the Giants' Gravepost grace to find the dungeon entrance.

steps.title: Roll into False Wall to Reveal Hidden Hallway
steps.description: Head down the initial staircase. Turn and roll into a false wall to the west to reveal a hidden hallway.

steps.title: Disable Flamethrower Trap with Crossbow
steps.description: Leap through a window near the end, travel south. Use a crossbow to disable the flamethrower trap to the west. Sprint past the hiding Flame Monk.

steps.title: Use Lift Trick to Access Lower Area
steps.description: Take the lift down. Trigger it to rise back up. A new compartment ascends from below. Pull the nearby lever, then ride the compartment down to a lower area.

steps.title: Pick Up Great Grave Glovewort and Giant's Seal
steps.description: Avoid the two watchdogs. Head down the east hall and climb the ladder. Find a Fire Prelate guarding a Great Grave Glovewort and the Giant's Seal.

steps.title: Escape Back to the Lift Room
steps.description: Return to the basement chamber, head down the west hall, climb another ladder to return to the room with the large wooden gate.

steps.title: Activate Lift for Light Statue, Open Gate, Kite Shadow Troll
steps.description: Activate the lift and step off (moves the light statue). Pull the lever to open the gate. Kite the shadow-cloaked troll back to the circle of light to remove shadows and defeat it. This opens the boss door.

steps.title: Defeat Ancient Hero of Zamor – Zamor Curved Sword & Armor Set
steps.description: Head east to the boss room. Defeat the Ancient Hero of Zamor for the Zamor Curved Sword and entire Zamor Armor Set.

steps.title: Locate Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs
steps.description: Move northeast from the Consecrated Snowfield grace. Pass the caravan pulled by two Yetis. Continue mostly east (if blocked, turn north). Find a dip southeast with a path leading to the entrance.

steps.title: Navigate Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs to Lever
steps.description: Take it slow — rushing is punished. Clear sneaky Imps, shoot chill traps from afar, avoid watchdogs. Get the Elder Imp Head from the staircase. Find the small passageway beneath. Hop onto a chill trap to ride it up to the lever. Pull it.

steps.title: Defeat Putrid Grave Warden Duelist – Great Grave Glovewort x2
steps.description: Return to the boss room. Defeat the Putrid Grave Warden Duelist for 2 Great Grave Gloveworts and the Rotten Gravekeeper Cloak.

phases.title: Crumbling Farum Azula – Final Great Grave Gloveworts

steps.title: Pick Up Great Grave Glovewort (Crumbling Beast Grave Depths)
steps.description: Start at the Crumbling Beast Grave Depths grace. Head west, leap to a rooftop, enter through a window to the upper level. Proceed to the end for the Great Grave Glovewort. Hop down near the crumbled guard rail.

steps.title: Pick Up Great Grave Glovewort (Dragon Temple)
steps.description: Start at the Dragon Temple grace. Sprint-jump west to a lower area. Follow a precarious path to a tall ladder. At the top, find the final Great Grave Glovewort.

steps.title: Enter Wyndham Catacombs
steps.description: Ascend to the northern area of Wyndham Ruins in Altus Plateau. Find the entrance behind the final ruins, tucked into the mountainside.

steps.title: Navigate Wyndham Catacombs to Boss Door Lever
steps.description: Head down the hallway and lift, through guillotine traps, into a waterlogged area. Climb the west ladder. Sprint over the rising platform to pull the lever. Backtrack to the north safe spot, drop onto the lowered platform, step off to a lower area. Open the gate with the lever there.

steps.title: Pick Up Lightning Scorpion Charm (Stonesword Key Required)
steps.description: Near the west ladder, use a Stonesword Key to clear a fog wall and grab the Lightning Scorpion Charm.

steps.title: Defeat Erdtree Burial Watchdog – Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [1]
steps.description: Retrace steps to the boss room. Defeat the Erdtree Burial Watchdog for the Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [1].

phases.title: Crumbling Farum Azula – Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [3]

steps.title: Note: Bell Bearing [2] Was Obtained in Part 8
steps.description: The Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [2] was obtained from the Giants' Mountaintop Catacombs in Part 8 (during Gurranq's Deathroot quest).

steps.title: Pick Up Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [3]
steps.description: Start from the Tempest-Facing Balcony grace. Travel southwest through the temple, take the lift to a lower area. Head southeast past enemies. Climb the tall ladder near the east edge. Platform down to a lower area. Find the Bell Bearing [3] in a gazebo at the southern edge.

phases.title: New Game+ Preparation – Rune Farming & Stockpiling

steps.title: Twin Maiden Husk Purchases Do NOT Carry Over to NG+
steps.description: Items purchased from the Twin Maiden Husks do not carry over to a New Journey. Stock up on smithing stones and gloveworts before starting NG+.

steps.title: Redeem Elden Remembrance for Sacred Relic Sword
steps.description: Exchange the Elden Remembrance at Finger Reader Enia for the Sacred Relic Sword. Upgrade it to at least +9.

steps.title: Farm Runes at Palace Approach Ledge-Road
steps.description: Travel to the Palace Approach Ledge-Road grace. Use the Sacred Relic Sword's skill to wipe out the row of Albinaurics. Rest and repeat. Boost with nighttime, Gold Scarab Talisman, and Gold-Pickled Fowl Feet.

steps.title: Buy Bulk Smithing Stones and Gloveworts
steps.description: Recommended: 120 of each Smithing Stone, 10 of each Somber Smithing Stone, 10 of each Ghost Glovewort, 10 of each Grave Glovewort. Takes 30–60 minutes of farming.

steps.title: Duplicate Remembrances at Walking Mausoleums (7 Total)
steps.description: There are 7 Walking Mausoleums. Each duplicates one Remembrance. Non-Shard Bearer Remembrances can only be duplicated at the two bell-less Mausoleums near the Mausoleum Compound in Liurnia.

steps.title: Collect Single-Pickup Items Before NG+
steps.description: Once picked up, these don't reappear in NG+: 8 Memory Stones, 20 Cracked Pots, 10 Ritual Pots, 10 Perfume Bottles, and dozens of Cookbooks. Explore to find any you've missed.
